article.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
article.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 的安全警告可能適得其反——政府已關閉其最強大的 AI
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 明確表示不滿，聲稱「發現狹隘的潛在越獄問題不應成為召回部署給數億人的商業模型的理由」。

article.title: Google AI Mode starts rolling out Search agents that keep track of information for you
article.summary: At I/O 2026, Google announced the concept of “Search agents,” with information agents now rolling out in AI Mode for AI Ultra subscribers.
article.title_zh: Google AI Mode 開始推出搜索代理，為用戶追蹤信息
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 宣布推出「搜索代理」概念，現已向 AI Ultra 訂閱者推出。

article.title: AI代理功能再進化　Workday推出全新代理開發工具

article.title: The tokenomics of telecom – how AT&T is re-engineering OSS/BSS with AI
article.summary: RCR’s free virtual Telco AI Forum is taking place on June 16th. Register here to explore AT&T’s telco AI strategy in more depth. Imagine for a second that a telecom network is like this massive, high-speed automated highway. Now, the…
article.title_zh: 電信的代幣經濟學 – AT&T如何用AI重新設計OSS/BSS
article.summary_zh: RCR免費虛擬Telco AI論壇將於6月16日舉辦，深入探討AT&T的電信AI策略。

article.title: UK Retail Investors Place $1 Billion of Orders in SpaceX IPO
article.summary: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.
article.title_zh: 英國零售投資者在SpaceX IPO中下單10億美元
article.summary_zh: 英國零售投資者購買了約3.64億美元的SpaceX股份，是全球最大IPO的一小部分。

article.title_zh: Security Bite：Apple 最令人印象深刻的代理 AI 功能隱藏在密碼應用中

article.title: Siri AI is powered by Gemini models, but is not Gemini – what does that mean?
article.summary: We know that Siri AI and other Apple Intelligence features are powered by Google’s Gemini models, but Apple has been at pains to point out that this is not the same as running Gemini on iPhone. While there are still some unknowns, a far clearer picture is emerging about exactly what all of this means …
article.title_zh: Siri AI 由 Gemini 模型提供支援，但不是 Gemini——這意味著什麼？
article.summary_zh: Siri AI 由 Google 的 Gemini 模型提供支援，但 Apple 強調這並非在 iPhone 上執行 Gemini。

article.title: OpenAI could cut ChatGPT prices to win you over from Claude
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR OpenAI may slash token prices to regain ground from Anthropic and make AI cheaper for customers, a new report says. A potential price war could test customer loyalty as switching between AI providers remains relatively easy. The AI industry’s battle for customers could soon be good news for users’ wallets. OpenAI is reportedly preparing steep cuts to its token costs to claw back enterprise momentum lost to rival Anthropic. OpenAI is considering reducing the cost of tokens, the units used to measure and bill for AI usage, before a possible similar action by its fast-rising competitor, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing people familiar with the matter.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 可能會降低 ChatGPT 價格來從 Claude 吸引用戶
article.summary_zh: 根據最新報告，OpenAI 可能會削減 token 價格以從 Anthropic 手中奪回市場份額。AI 提供商之間的價格戰可能會考驗用戶忠誠度。

article.title: Radeon RX 9070 XT finally appears in Steam Hardware Survey — RDNA 4 flagship surprisingly lands just behind RTX 5080
article.summary: AMD’s Radeon RX 9070 XT graphics card has finally penetrated the Steam Survey video card results table, going straight in at position 25.
article.title_zh: Radeon RX 9070 XT 終於現身 Steam 硬體調查——RDNA 4 旗艦產品出人意料地排在 RTX 5080 之後
article.summary_zh: AMD 的 Radeon RX 9070 XT 顯示卡終於出現在 Steam 調查視頻卡排行表中，直接進入第 25 位。

article.title: Nvidia's high-speed AI data center storage servers break cover, touting 2.9 petabytes of storage and extreme PCIe 6.0 performance — Wiwynn shows off SCADA server with GPU-accelerated storage
article.summary: Wiwynn is among the first to demonstrate Nvidia SCADA server that promises to offer AI systems petabytes of ultra-fast storage thanks to GPU-accelerated storage acceleration.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 高速 AI 資料中心儲存伺服器亮相，號稱 2.9 PB 儲存容量和極致 PCIe 6.0 效能——Wiwynn 展示 GPU 加速儲存的 SCADA 伺服器
article.summary_zh: Wiwynn 率先展示 Nvidia SCADA 伺服器，藉由 GPU 加速儲存加速技術為 AI 系統提供 PB 級超高速儲存。

article.title: Gemini can now control your Google TV’s settings, but only on these models
article.summary: Announced earlier this year, Google TV is now rolling out a Gemini update that lets you adjust TV settings with voice commands, but only on TCL models at first.
article.title_zh: Gemini 現可控制您的 Google TV 設定，但目前僅限這些型號
article.summary_zh: Google TV 現推出 Gemini 更新，讓您可透過語音命令調整電視設定，但目前僅限 TCL 型號。
